full_text:
Zhang Qun 張群
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Qun (張群). Leader of a group of envoys to Gongsun Yuan, his escape is hampered by ulcers so he sends others ahead. Zhang Qun was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
